# Stiripentol 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Stiripentol 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Stiripentol</strong> 目前有 <strong>31 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Stiripentol 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Diacomit is indicated for use in conjunction with clobazam and valproate as adjunctive therapy of refractory generalized tonic-clonic seizures in patients with severe myoclonic epilepsy in infancy...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>restless legs syndrome（98.8%）</li>
<li>trigeminal nerve neoplasm（97.2%）</li>
<li>West syndrome（95.0%）</li>
<li>developmental and epileptic encephalopathy（94.5%）</li>
<li>1q44 microdeletion syndrome（94.3%）</li>
<li>episodic kinesigenic dyskinesia（94.2%）</li>
<li>acute encephalopathy with biphasic seizures and late reduced diffusion（94.1%）</li>
<li>PURA-related severe neonatal hypotonia-seizures-encephalopathy syndrome due to a point mutation（94.0%）</li>
<li>neonatal period electroclinical syndrome（93.8%）</li>
<li>Wernicke-Korsakoff syndrome（93.8%）</li>
<li>myoclonic epilepsy, Hartung type（93.7%）</li>
<li>X-linked dominant intellectual disability-epilepsy syndrome（93.6%）</li>
<li>insomnia (disease)（93.5%）</li>
<li>DK1-CDG（93.3%）</li>
<li>genetic lethal multiple congenital anomalies/dysmorphic syndrome（93.3%）</li>
<li>infancy electroclinical syndrome（93.3%）</li>
<li>microtriplication 11q24.1（93.1%）</li>
<li>sleep disorder, initiating and maintaining sleep（93.0%）</li>
<li>guanidinoacetate methyltransferase deficiency（92.9%）</li>
<li>CCDC115-CDG（92.8%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/stiripentol/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
